title: Aggregate Compaction (gc) + Event-Count Observability — Design
summary: Technical design for an operator-driven aggregate compaction operation and a cardinality-safe per-aggregate event-count metric.
notes: Located in specs/ path with technical implementation contracts (event types, storage atomicity, metrics collection). Status is Draft, not a locked ADR. Contains a Decision-adjacent design but primary content is build-level technical constraints, so SPEC over ADR.
